meta.title: How To Make AI MUSIC Video for Suno AI Songs (NEW Method)
meta.description:
Learn How To use an AI Music Video generator to create an AI music video
Try OpenArt 👉  http://openart.ai/home/?ref=aimusic

In this tutorial I show how to make an AI music Video using a new AI video generator. You can make some great songs through Suno AI and use one of 3 methods shown in this video to create your very own AI music video.

Tools I used for the music video
OpenArt -  http://openart.ai/home/?ref=aimusic


👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
